headline: Bond Traders Take Warsh at Word, See Inflation Fight Continuing
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Bond traders and Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh are in agreement on a crucial point: The central bank’s fight against inflation still seems far from over. headline: This Crypto Fund Stakes Everything and Pays 7%, No Exchange Account Needed
summary: BlackRock's Ethereum ETF has pulled in billions from investors who wanted clean crypto exposure, but a rival fund already does something ETHA structurally cannot, and institutions are quietly lining up for it.

headline: Can the Australian model rescue the US retirement system? Trump seems to think so.
summary: President Trump says Australia's retirement system could serve as a model for the US. Is that possible?

headline: Larry Fink Says Bitcoin Has 'More Stability' at Current Levels: BlackRock CEO 'Very Bullish on the Markets'
summary: Larry Fink, CEO of BlackRock Inc., stated on Wednesday that Bitcoin is more stable at current levels, with excessive leverage largely washed out of the system. Is Fink Betting On Bitcoin’s Bull Run? During an interview with CNBC, Fink said...
